verdict: PASS — all hard checks clear; one soft finding on word-count metadata accuracy.

soft_findings.detail: reading.meta.json declares word_count=1060 (within [800,1200] range). The prompt-briefing estimate of ~1253 words, if accurate, is 4.4% over the 1200-word ceiling — still within the soft zone (hard-fail threshold is >1500w / >25% over). Either figure keeps reading_minutes at 6 (at the ceiling of [4,6], not over). No hard fail triggered. Recommend regenerating the meta sidecar word_count from the final reading text to ensure the declared figure is accurate.

length.note: Declared meta figure (1060w) is within range. Briefing estimate (1253w) is 4.4% over ceiling — soft only. reading_minutes=6 is at the ceiling but not over.

bibliography_entries: 1. APXML. Retry Mechanisms for LLM Applications.
3. Python Instructor. Retry Patterns for Structured LLM Output.

no_forward_references.note: Line 113 defers advanced techniques (exponential backoff, structured output libraries) with a one-sentence named-and-deferred pointer — compliant per SKILL.md scope rule.

sampled_assertions.assertion: A retry loop is code that runs a validation check and if check fails calls the LLM again
Corrective message example with JSON key answer and confidence
Retry counter is a simple integer variable starting at zero
Common default is 2 or 3 retries for beginner projects
Fallback dict: {error: max retries exceeded, result: None}
Three In Practice scenarios: JSON chatbot, text classifier, data extractor
Key Takeaways bullets including full pattern mnemonic

formatting.notes: All five key concepts use bold-term/plain-meaning shape. In Practice and Key Takeaways use bullet lists. Procedures use numbered steps in Worked Example. Corrective message and fallback shown as inline examples in Key Concepts.

no_assessment_references.note: Corpus section 4 contains 'Assessment A4 (Python and Prompt Engineering Portfolio, due this week)' but the reading artifact does NOT reproduce this language. Clean strip confirmed.

scope.note: Reading stays tightly on retry loop pattern. Advanced techniques (exponential backoff, structured output libraries) mentioned as a one-sentence future pointer only — not taught. No scope creep.

gold_example_comparison.assessment: Reading meets gold-example bar: H1 title present, clean six-section template, bold-term definitions, inline code examples, analogy before abstraction (form-submission for retry loop), no frontmatter, no assessment prose, citations tightly linked. Structure and register align with both gold examples on file.

summary: 10 checks run. 0 hard fails. 1 soft finding (word_count_meta_discrepancy — declared meta figure 1060 may not reflect final text; briefing estimate 1253 is soft-only at 4.4% over ceiling). Reading is structurally clean, beginner-readable, faithful to corpus, correctly strips assessment language, and embeds the diagram in Key Concepts. PASS — eligible for HITL #3.
